sections.paragraph: εὖ [cp. Hom. ἐΐυς/ἐΰς ‘good’ with connotation of being serviceable] adv. ‘in a serviceable/helpful way’, well εὖ ποιεῖν treat well/kindly Mk 14:7; εὖ πράσσειν act appropriately, do well Ac 15:29; ἵνα εὖ σοι γένηται so that it may turn out well for you Eph 6:3. As interjection in commendation of excellent service well done! superb! Mt 25:21, 23; Lk 19:17.
